visual_prompt_hint: Hub-and-spoke diagram with Payor in center, three spokes to Government, Commercial Insurance, and Self-Pay
prompt: Hub and Spoke layout. Center hub: Payor (soft blue). Top spoke: Government (teal) with Medicare, Medicaid. Right spoke: Commercial (warm yellow) with Aetna, BCBS, UHC. Bottom spoke: Self-Pay (light purple) with No insurance. Title: Types of Payors.
